title: gymnadenia rhellicani
intro: Gymnadenia rhellicani, also known as the Autumn Ladies' Tresses, is a species of orchid native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Gymnadenia rhellicani include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Gymnadenia rhellicani can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
